examples: He received rudimentary village schooling, but mostly he roamed his uncle's farm collecting the fossils that were so abundant in the rocks of the Cotswold hills.
The Thames rises in the Cotswold hills.
His destination was Chobham Common, a long way from his Cotswold home.
The planning application is due to be considered by Cotswold District Council on 12 June.
Two children have found "rare" specimens of a fossilised sea creature at the Cotswold Water Park.
